bias.analyst: Price is now compressing directly on top of the great floor - and after absorbing the first attack, the wall REFILLED to bigger than before. Sellers are spending ammunition into a bid that will not move; that structure usually resolves upward, though a sizeable cap has formed a couple of levels overhead, so even the bounce has homework to do. The confirmation discipline just dodged its third fake breakdown in two days. Still flat; the half-hour verdict lands shortly.
bias.commentator: The siege continues at the box - and here's the twist: every tackle the wall makes, MORE defenders arrive! The away side just threw their big striker at the line - swallowed whole, play bounced straight back. But don't celebrate yet: they've parked a second bus two rows up the pitch. Theo's side nearly fell for a dummy run again - the video referee (our two-bar rule) waved it off. THIRD fake-out dodged in two days! Half-hour whistle in fifteen!

events.analyst: Theo Live is now public. From here on, session events appear in this feed with a delay - wins, losses, and the days we sit on our hands.
events.commentator: Welcome to the grounds! The gates are open for the first time. Pre-season record is on the board - including the losses. We hide nothing here, folks.

events.analyst: Market open. Theo watches the first 30 minutes before committing - the [indicator] decides which playbook is valid today.
events.commentator: KICKOFF! The bell rings and we're underway. Theo holds its shape for the first half hour - no wild lunges before the game shows its pattern.
